meaning: n.挂锁,(官方下令的)关闭,禁止进入
examples: They had put a padlock on the door of his house.
This is a manufacturer of burglar-proof padlock.
Such partitions have a padlock icon next to their entries.
There is a reason the padlock and pita appeal to us, practically as strongly as oranges.
Conspiracy theorists suspected a jilted lover or enterprising padlock peddlers seeking new space for their goods.
